title: POST /books endpoint implemented
evidence: app.py:59-77 create_book() with validation and JSON response

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint implemented
evidence: app.py:99-120 update_book() validates and updates fields

title: SQLite database storage implemented
evidence: app.py:16-30 init_db() creates books table; uses sqlite3.connect()

title: JSON responses with HTTP status codes
evidence: app.py uses jsonify() throughout, status codes: 200 (GET), 201 (POST), 204 (DELETE), 400 (validation), 404 (not found)

title: Input validation for title and author
evidence: app.py:64-67, 110-113 validates both required and non-empty

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md includes pip install, python app.py, endpoints table, and example curl

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: test_app.py has 7 tests: test_health, test_create_and_get_book, test_create_requires_title_and_author, test_list_and_filter_by_author, test_update_book, test_delete_book, test_get_missing_returns_404
